title: Stock Radar: Apollo Hospitals stock hits fresh record highs in July; will the rally continue?
summary: Apollo Hospitals stock has surged to new record highs in July, with technical indicators suggesting the rally is poised to continue. Experts recommend buying on dips for potential targets above Rs 9,100. The stock's strong upward momentum, supported by moving averages and a rising channel, indicates sustained buying interest and a positive outlook for further gains.
